hero.headline: Finally know where your money goes.
hero.subheadline: Owó-mi connects every Canadian account — chequing, TFSA, RRSP, FHSA, credit cards — and shows you what's really going on. Built in Canada. Read-only. Bank-grade security.
hero.trustLine: No credit card · Read-only · Built in Canada

features.headline: Everything you need. Nothing you don't.
features.subheadline: Calm, clear, and built for how Canadians actually manage money.

block1.headline: Track every dollar, automatically.
block1.body: Connect all your Canadian accounts in minutes. Owó-mi categorizes every transaction and shows you exactly where your money is going.

block2.headline: Hit your Canadian savings goals.
block2.body: RRSP, TFSA, FHSA, RESP — know your contribution room, set targets, and watch your progress in real time.

block3.headline: Budget without the stress.
block3.body: Set monthly budgets for any category. Owó-mi flags overspend before it happens, so there are no more end-of-month surprises.

testimonials.headline: Used by Canadians from coast to coast.
testimonials.subheadline: From Halifax to Victoria, Owó-mi helps real people see their money clearly.

items.name: Aanya R.
items.quote: I had no idea I was spending $380 a month on subscriptions. After two weeks with Owó-mi, I'd cancelled six and put the savings straight into my TFSA. Best $8 a month I spend.

items.name: Marc-André B.
items.quote: My partner and I used to argue about money constantly. With Owó-mi we can both see exactly what's going in and out — no more surprises at the end of the month.

items.name: Jordan K.
items.quote: I never knew what my RRSP contribution room actually was. Owó-mi put it front and centre. I've put away $14,000 more than I would have otherwise.

shortQuotes.name: Priya M.
shortQuotes.quote: Finally — a budgeting app that understands TFSAs and RRSPs.

shortQuotes.name: Sarah L.
shortQuotes.quote: Clean, fast, and actually Canadian. Love it.

shortQuotes.name: Fatima A.

shortQuotes.name: Liam T.
shortQuotes.quote: Knows the difference between a TFSA and an RRSP. Finally.

shortQuotes.name: Mei L.
shortQuotes.quote: My finances went from chaotic to crystal clear in one weekend.

shortQuotes.name: Omar H.
shortQuotes.quote: Simple, private, and works beautifully on mobile.

shortQuotes.name: Sophie D.
shortQuotes.quote: The budget alerts are a game-changer. Caught overspend twice already.

shortQuotes.name: Rajan P.
shortQuotes.quote: Data hosted in Canada matters to me. Owó-mi gets it.

items.a: Yes. All data is encrypted with AES-256 at rest and TLS 1.3 in transit. Your data is hosted exclusively in Canada (Montréal region). We hold SOC 2 Type II certification, and our security practices are audited annually.
Never. Owó-mi is read-only. We connect to your accounts to read transaction data — we cannot initiate transfers, payments, or any movement of funds. Full stop.

items.q: My bank app already shows me my balance. Why do I need this?
items.a: Your bank shows you one account at a time. Owó-mi gives you a single view across all your accounts — chequing, savings, TFSA, RRSP, FHSA, credit cards — so you can see the full picture and actually make decisions.

items.q: I track everything in a spreadsheet. Why would I switch?
items.a: Spreadsheets require manual entry, break down when life gets busy, and can't tell you your RRSP contribution room. Owó-mi does all the data entry automatically and surfaces insights your spreadsheet never could.

items.q: What Canadian banks and institutions do you support?
items.a: Owó-mi supports 250+ Canadian banks, credit unions, and financial institutions — including all Big 6 banks, Desjardins, Tangerine, EQ Bank, and most regional credit unions.

items.q: Where is my data stored? Who can see it?
items.a: Your data is stored in Canada (Montréal, AWS ca-central-1). Only you can access your data. We do not sell, share, or use your financial data for advertising. Our full privacy policy is available at owo-mi.ca/privacy.

items.q: What happens if I cancel my subscription?
items.a: You keep access to the Free tier. All your data is retained. You can export everything at any time in CSV format. We don't hold your data hostage.

Absolument. Owó-mi is fully bilingual — English and Canadian French (Québécois). Switch languages anytime from the navigation bar. Our French interface uses proper Quebec financial terminology: CELI, REER, CELIAPP.

finalCta.headline: Your money, made simple.
finalCta.subheadline: Try Owó-mi free for 30 days. No card. Cancel any time.

footer.compliance: PIPEDA & Quebec Law 25 compliant. Data hosted in Canada (Montréal). Privacy Officer: privacy@owo-mi.ca
footer.copyright: © 2026 Owó-mi. "Owó-mi" (oh-WOH MEE) means "my money" in Yoruba.
